title: Rosbash/Janelia StickLAMP Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6gkj8","text":"A protocol for the detection of SARS-CoV-2 from saliva samples featuring a rapid purification step and a high-contrast colorimetric readout. Saliva is first inactivated using a 100x inactivation reagent consisting of 2.5M TCEP, 100 mM EDTA, 1.2N NaOH solution diluted to approximately 1x final concentration and heated to 95C for 5 minutes. RNA is rapidly purified and concentrated with magnetic beads in a PEG/NaCl-based buffer using a 3D-printed magnetic stick that enables selective separation of beads without carryover of saliva contaminants. Beads are eluted directly into an RT-LAMP reaction mix, which uses a novel high contrast dye that turns from purple to clear when acidified by nucleic acid amplification products that enables unambiguous identification of successful amplification. This protocol is sensitive down to 1 copy/µl of SARS-CoV-2 in 300 µl of saliva. This degree of sensitivity enables faithful detection of SARS-CoV-2 even in pooled samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

Saliva samples \u003e1ml will likely have to be subsampled)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9al6a","text":"Magnetic stick","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"gdeo","text":"1 magnetic tip per sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"chf1i","text":"Bead mix: Let bead mix come to room temperature for 20 minutes prior to use, and ensure beads are suspended in solution by vortexing or pipetting up and down","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5u509","text":"130mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f659c","text":"SARS-CoV-2 Master mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c6ae0","text":"Actin Master mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eiig","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Instruct patient to avoid food, drink, toothbrushing, and nasal sprays for a minimum of 00:30:00 prior to sample collection
Begin pooling saliva in your mouth. Saliva production can be stimulated by thinking about food, or about the saliva collection itself.
Gently expel saliva into the funnel, tapping to collect in the tube, until amount of saliva is approximately flush with the base of the funnel 750 µL, Approximately
Add inactivation reagent to approximately 1x final concentration. Reaction is tolerant of between 0.7x to 2x final concentration. 7.5 µL, Approximately 100x Inactivation Reagent Contributed by users

Heat tube to approximately 95 °C for 00:05:00 . Viral RNA release is similar between 93-98C. Use tube clip to prevent popping. ThermoMixer (Benchtop Incubator, Eppendorf, 5382000023, Any heat block will suffice, https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Temperature-Control-and-Mixing-44518/Instruments-44519/Eppendorf-ThermoMixerC-PF-19703.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/bcrsa.jpeg )
Remove tube from heat and let rest at Room temperature for at least 00:03:00 OR On ice for at least 00:00:30 .

While tube is resting, aliquot 25 µL SARS-CoV-2 mastermix and 25 µL Actin mastermix to separate wells of PCR strip tube, 96-well plate, or 1.5ml tube per sample On ice . Per run, prepare two additional 25 µL SARS-CoV-2 mastermixes for positive and negative controls. SARS-CoV-2 Master Mix Contributed by users Actin Master Mix Contributed by users
Add approximately 0.7x volumes of bead mix - 525 µL, Approximately . Sample is tolerant of between 0.7x-1.2x volumes of bead mix. Pipette up and down to mix. Bead Mix Contributed by users
Let stand at Room temperature for 00:03:00

Cap magnetic stick with a clean tip and dip in bead/sample mix for 00:02:00 , dipping up and down 5 times every 00:00:30 . Meanwhile, prepare 500 µL 130mM NaCl in a separate 1.5ml or 2ml tube. Magnetic Stick (Rosbash/Brown, None, Magnetic stick used for bead purifications) Magnetic Tips Contributed by users NaCl Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #53014
Remove magnetic stick from sample and swirl in clean 130mM NaCl solution for 00:00:05 . Discard NaCl solution.
Remove magnetic stick from wash sample and place in SARS-CoV-2 mix for 00:00:30
Remove magnetic stick from SARS-CoV-2 mix and place in Actin mix for 00:00:30

Add 5 µL water to additional SARS-CoV-2 Mix (negative control) and 5 µL synthetic Twist SARS-CoV-2 positive RNA control to additional SARS-CoV-2 Mix, prepared in Step 8. Water Contributed by users Twist synthetic SARS-CoV-2 RNA control Twist Bioscience Catalog #Mt007544.1

Cap tubes and place on 65 °C heating apparatus for 00:40:00 . If using a thermal cycler, run with the following program: 65C for 40 minutes 4C indefinitely ThermoMixer (Benchtop Incubator, Eppendorf, 5382000023, Any heat block will suffice, https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Temperature-Control-and-Mixing-44518/Instruments-44519/Eppendorf-ThermoMixerC-PF-19703.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/bcrsa.jpeg )
Remove tubes from heating apparatus and examine color change.
If a positive sample is found when pooling, re-test pooled samples individually.
creator: Albert Yu
